creator: gerald@pfeifer.com
text:
On Mon, 5 Jan 2009, Dmitry Marakasov wrote:
> I think that in any case knob or explicit disabling of something that
> changes list of depends is better than introducing a hidden dependency.

Fair enough, I went through the list again and explicitly disabled three
options.

Among others, all those optional dependencies listed in the original PR 
submission are now handled explicitly (some via OPTIONs). :-)

Gerald
